name: Fruited Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Nectarines and/or plums, pitted and diced
recipeInstructions:
Makes 6 servings
1. In a medium saucepan, bring milk, cinnamon, 1/4 cup (plus 1 tablespoon) brown sugar, and salt to boiling.
2. Stir in rice. Reduce heat to low; cover, simmer for 35-45 minutes or until rice is tender. Stir occasionally.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg yolk.
4. Stir in 1/3 of the hot rice mixture into the egg yolk.
5. Slowly pour the egg mixture back into the rice mixture, stirring rapidly.
6. Cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes or until the mixture thickens. Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Serve warm or cover surface of rice with plastic wrap and chill until ready to serve.
8. Meanwhile, toss fruit with remaining 1 tablespoon brown sugar; let stand for 15 minutes.
9. Spoon rice pudding into dessert bowls; top with fruit. Serve any remaining fruit on the side, if desired.
